zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire於1480年1月21日出生時，她的父親Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard36歲，母親Elizabeth Tilney37歲。她於1498年與Thomas Boleyn在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布利可林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1504年住在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 阿馬格紐利。她去世於1537年4月3日在英國英格蘭肯特維享年57歲，埋葬在英國素可格林德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire于1480年1月21日出生时，她的父亲Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard36岁，母亲Elizabeth Tilney37岁。她于1498年与Thomas Boleyn在英国英格兰諾福爾可布利可林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1504年住在英国北爱尔兰庫迪 阿馬格紐利。她去世于1537年4月3日在英国英格兰肯特維享年57岁，埋葬在英国素可格林德。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire was born on 21 January 1480, her father, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Tilney, was 37. She married Thomas Boleyn in 1498, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Newry, County Armagh, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom in 1504. She died on 3 April 1537, in Hever, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Glynde, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire est née le 21 janvier 1480, son père, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tilney, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Boleyn en 1498, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Newry, County Armagh, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni en 1504. Elle est décédée le 3 avril 1537, à Hever, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Glynde, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire am 21. Januar 1480 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Tilney 37. Sie hat 1498 in Blickling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Boleyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1504 hat sie in Newry, County Armagh, Nordirland, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 3. April 1537 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Hever, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Glynde, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire è nata il il 21 gennaio 1480, sua padre, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Tilney, aveva 37 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshireが1480年1月21日に生まれた時，父Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howardは36歳，母Elizabeth Tilneyは37歳であった。1498年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングでThomas Boleynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年にはイギリス北アイルランドコウントイ アルマグニューリーに住んでいた。彼女は1537年4月3日にイギリスイギリスケントヘバーで57歳で死去し，イギリススセックスグリンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire(이)가 1480년 1월 21일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Tilney(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 블릭링에서 Thomas Boleyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1504년도에 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 아마그h 뉴리에서 살았다. 그녀는 1537년 4월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 헤버에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 그린드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1480, seu pai, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tilney, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Boleyn em 1498, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Newry, County Armagh, Irlanda do Norte, United Kingdom em 1504. Ela faleceu em 3 de abril de 1537, em Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Glynde, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire родилась 21 января 1480 г., её отцу по имени Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tilney, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Boleyn в 1498 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности нюри, коунти армаг, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания в 1504 году. Она умерла 3 апреля 1537 г. в местности хивир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности глинд, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Howard Countess of Wiltshire nació el 21 de enero de 1480, su papá, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tilney, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Thomas Boleyn en 1498, en Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Newry, County Armagh, Irlanda del Norte, Reino Unido en 1504. Murió el 3 de abril de 1537, en Hever, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Glynde, Sussex, Inglaterra.
